prompt: A hyper realistic luxury editorial advertisement for Nike, executed with a restrained, high-fashion aesthetic. A male leg is suspended mid-air at a precise 45-degree angle toward the camera, styled with immaculate white athletic crew socks featuring a subtle, tonal Nike logo. The composition is clean and intentional, with generous negative space. The sneaker occupies the lower half of the frame, positioned slightly off-center for a balanced editorial layout. The footwear is a premium Nike low-top silhouette with glacier teal suede overlays and off-white tumbled leather panels. The iridescent chrome Swoosh reflects soft, diffused studio lighting, creating a refined, mirror-like highlight without harsh glare. Shot with a shallow depth of field: the sneaker remains perfectly sharp, while the leg transitions into a soft, elegant blur. Background & Atmosphere: A deep matte charcoal background with a subtle gradient falloff. No visible graffiti or noise—only a faint, almost imperceptible texture to avoid flatness. A soft vignette gently draws focus toward the sneaker. Lighting: Soft, controlled, diffused lighting from camera-left. Low contrast compared to sports ads, but with precise highlight control. Gentle specular highlight on chrome Swoosh. Soft glow on white leather. Minimal shadow harshness. Studio-quality, fashion editorial lighting. Typography & Layout (Luxury Minimalism). Top center (very small, spaced serif): “PRECISION · FORM · MOTION”. Center-right headline (elegant hierarchy): “FORM” (ultra-bold, clean sans-serif), “IN MOTION” (thin, high tracking). Microtext (extremely subtle, small scale): “Engineered simplicity. Refined movement.” Graphic Style: No bright accent colors. No arrows or aggressive elements. No clutter. No zine-style overlays. Pure, editorial restraint. Bottom-left Lockup: “LESS, BUT BETTER.” (bold, minimal sans-serif). Subline (small, refined): “Every detail serves a purpose.” Branding: Upper right: Nike wordmark and Swoosh in soft white or light gray. Small, understated—never overpowering Finish. Photorealistic, high-end commercial photography. Luxury fashion campaign aesthetic. Ultra-clean composition. 4K resolution. Vertical 3:4 aspect ratio. Optimized for premium digital campaigns and editorial placements
